title: 如何   ...有没有知道内情的葱油  详细讲讲？
meta_description: 如何   ...有没有知道内情的葱油  详细讲讲？ - It is what I heard from people, there's many backroom stories you hear in certain circles. The actress falling naked out of...
contents:
It is what I heard from people, there's many backroom stories you hear in certain circles. The actress falling naked out of an apartment ruled an accident, stories goes she was raped and dropped because she refused someone she shouldn't have. Bo Xilai staged a coup against Xi during the first months of Xi's first term, it's why he was brought down so fast and hard. Chief of Nanning broacasting station was charged with corruption, he was giving lavish gifts and fucking the new news achor (she was pretty hot). Stuff you don't hear on the news or the internet.... person to person stories. Or it could all be bullshit and just rumors.
这是我从人们那里听到的，你在某些圈子里听到了很多幕后故事。 这位女演员赤身裸体地从公寓里掉了下来，她被裁定是一场意外，故事说她被强奸并扔下去的，因为她拒绝了一个她不应该拒绝的人。 薄熙来在习第一个任期的头几个月就对习发动了政变，这就是他被这么快、这么狠地打倒的原因。 南宁广播站站长被控贪污，送大礼，操新主播（她很惹火）。 您在新闻或互联网上听不到的东西……人与人之间的故事。 或者这可能都是胡说八道，只是谣言。
